The '''''Serpent's Kiss''''' was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] warship. It fought at the [[Defense of Mon Calamari (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Defense of Mon Calamari]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
